diff: The Spark Product Backstop is a fixed value of USDS, updated from time to time by Spark governance via the Spark SubDAO Proxy Policy Changes process ([A.6.1.1.1.3.4.1.1 - Spark SubDAO Proxy Policy Changes](90240e75-6e5f-4a54-8999-ee430cfcf20d)), meant to cover the anticipated risk exposures to Spark products that are not covered under Sky’s Required Risk Capital framework.
